title: Saga: emit nft.metadata.generated + edit-in-place announcement (close the bare-card class)
description:
POINTER ISSUE (saga held for later per operator 2026-06-02). The durable fix for bare Mibera Shadow mint announcements.

ROOT CAUSE: VM generation is browser-initiated (honeyroad vm-page onMintSuccess -> tasks.trigger). Closed tab / dropped trigger orphans the vm_generation_status row at pending; characters announce-mint.ts fail-soft posts a BARE card and never re-fires. #3252 was the instance (recovered manually 2026-06-02).

STOPGAP ALREADY SHIPPED (not this issue): mibera-honeyroad PR #108 — heal-vm-mint-stalls schedules.task (cron */5) auto-heals orphaned generations server-side + escalates loudly to a Discord ops webhook. This is a SAFETY NET; it does NOT remove the browser dependency and does NOT heal already-posted bare cards.

THE SAGA (this issue), two parts across two repos:
1. mibera-honeyroad: (a) subscribe to sonar nft.mint.detected.mibera-shadow.v1 -> fire generation SERVER-SIDE (kills the browser dependency entirely); (b) emit a NEW event nft.metadata.generated after process-vm-mint.ts completion (save_metadata + status=completed, ~line 122-127). honeyroad currently emits NOTHING on completion and has no @0xhoneyjar/events dep.
2. freeside-characters: persist {tokenId, channelId, messageId} when announce-mint posts (no message-id store exists today); subscribe to nft.metadata.generated; PATCH the original message in place (Discord CV2 supports webhook/bot message edit) to add image+traits. This gives post-on-mint -> edit-in-when-ready, the completion guarantee, AND back-fills bare cards (no duplicates).

ALSO (separate, durable sensor): reconciliation check comparing sonar minted-count vs honeyroad generated-count, alerting on drift. The sweep is the stopgap; reconciliation is the real sensor.

This is the announcement SUBSTRATE the operator wants: typed primitives (mint.detected, metadata.generated, identity.resolved) + a pure presentation layer (mediums-api theme->CV2 renderer #7 is the convergence target; characters currently hand-rolls its own renderer) that any building (score, activities) can compose. Real cycle — NOETHER architects the event contract, FAGAN gates.

Refs: honeyroad PR #108; root-cause memory project_announcement-degradation-and-auto-heal-sweep; sonar publisher src/lib/events-publisher.ts; characters announce-mint.ts + mint-announcement-render.ts.

title: Boot-wire /role-sync end-to-end (SHADOW) + vendor purupuru.yaml manifest + isolated actor resolution
description: bd-71y built the /role-sync trigger but setRoleSyncDeps is uncalled (fails closed 'not configured'). Wire it into boot: (1) compose shadowPreviewLayer/liveApplyLayer via composition-root + an OrchestrationInvoker that runs runTierRoleGoLive; (2) VENDOR purupuru.yaml into characters with admin_principals=[ae0558c7-aeb2-48f0-906d-ad0a50108b19] + guild_id 1495534680617910396 (deployed bot has NO local manifest + deps only the SHA-pinned substrate, so manifestPath resolves to nothing) + set manifestPath→it; (3) wire score (SCORE_PURUPURU_API_KEY env, staged) + config-service getRoleMap (seed fallback) + wallet↔discord link (bd-m2v) + RosterSource for SHADOW; (4) ISOLATED actor resolution — /role-sync resolves the invoking CM's discord→identity user_id directly (identity-api /v1/resolve/account/discord/{id}), NOT via global AUTH_BACKEND (keeps onboarding isolated from the persona daemon per the voiceless-building brief); (5) SHADOW-first, fail-closed. Goal: a CM fires /role-sync on Purupuru → SHADOW discrepancy renders, zero writes.

DEP-A CONTRACT (IMP-001) — identity-api GET /v1/resolve/account/discord/{discord_id}
OWNER: identity-api maintainer (Eileen/cluster-spine) · ESCALATION: loa-freeside#191 topology thread
TARGET: before live THJ onboarding go-live (cutover gate · docs/ONBOARDING-CUTOVER.md)
RESPONSE 200: { user_id: string }  (the cluster-spine user_id for this discord_id)
RESPONSE 404: not linked (the NEW-user path · client treats as null → mint handoff token)
ERROR STATES: 5xx → bounded retry then degrade; client NEVER fails the user on this (slip-fallback)
ACCEPTANCE: (a) a linked discord_id returns its user_id; (b) an unlinked one returns 404 not 500;
  (c) idempotent + side-effect-free (safe to call on every verify click)
SLIP-FALLBACK (IMP-002): until shipped, set ONBOARDING_IDEMPOTENT_MODE=resolve-by-wallet →
  dispatch SKIPS this pre-check (degraded idempotency; the web-flow link is idempotent so safe).
CONSUMER READY: freeside-characters auth-client.resolveByDiscord built+tested (cycle-009 sprint-1);
  wired into onboarding-dispatch pre-check (sprint-2). This endpoint is the ONLY remaining blocker
  for full-idempotency live deploy.
close_reason: DEP-A verified LIVE 2026-05-30: GET identity.0xhoneyjar.xyz/v1/resolve/account/discord/{id} returns semantic 404 (no user linked = built). Stale-open false blocker.

title: cycle-008 S5 (g26): Anthropic-SDK trace capture + outcome classification + stream hooks
freeside-worlds substrate: thread LIVE LatentQualified provenance + add RosterIdentitySnapshot to RosterSource port (bd-m2v seams 2+3)
description:
Two freeside-worlds (SHA-pinned @freeside-worlds/shadow-substrate, SACRED here) substrate gaps surfaced while closing bd-m2v in freeside-characters. Both require a freeside-worlds change — do NOT edit the pinned package from this repo.

GAP 1 (SEAM 3 — provenance, already noted in bd-m2v): effectful/loaders.ts:loadLatentCounts HARDCODES source:'MOCK' on every LatentQualified (SHA 26d11b7). Even the LIVE ScoreSource adapter (bd-tfl) + the LIVE count surface as source:'MOCK' in the Discrepancy. Honest LIVE provenance needs loadLatentCounts to thread a LIVE/MOCK flag from the ScoreSource port (e.g. ScoreSource.latentQualified returns {count, source} OR loadLatentCounts takes a provenance arg). Until then the count is honest but the provenance label is wrong-by-design.

GAP 2 (SEAM 2 — roster identity snapshot): the go_live roster-freshness B1 guard needs a RosterIdentitySnapshot (member-id ⊕ role-id SETS) for rosterFingerprint, but the RosterSource Context.Tag port surfaces ONLY CurrentRoster (per-role member COUNTS). roster-freshness.ts's own header says the LIVE RosterSource 'produces a RosterIdentitySnapshot ALONGSIDE the render-model' — but the pinned port has NO method for it, and the repo's roster-source.live.ts does not produce one. WORKAROUND in freeside-characters (go-live-orchestrator.ts): an INJECTED RosterIdentityReader supplies the snapshot. The honest fix is a snapshot method on the substrate RosterSource port (e.g. currentRosterIdentity(world) → RosterIdentitySnapshot) so the LIVE roster adapter is the single source and the orchestrator stops injecting a parallel reader.

Ref: bd-m2v, bd-tfl, grimoires/loa/context/2026-06-03-scoresource-live-adapter-build-brief.md. Consumer-side (this repo) work is COMPLETE behind the injected seams; these are the upstream substrate follow-ups.

title: Member-centric tier→role SHADOW CM dashboard (CV2) — guild members → their tier → role, before→after
description: PIVOT from leaderboard-centric (top-50 qualified wallets, the latent/growth view) to MEMBER-centric (each guild member → their tier → their role) — the correct frame for 'manage roles for members of our server.' Grounded: leaderboard top-50 are NOT discord-linked; the operator's wallet IS scored (tier 'member') + linked but is rank 3329 (not top-50), so leaderboard-centric never sees real members. Member-centric chain (all verified live): guild member discord id → identity GET /v1/resolve/account/discord/{id} → user_id → GET /v1/profile?world=purupuru&userId={user_id} → primary_wallet (+wallets[]) → score-api GET /v1/wallets/{wallet}?community=purupuru → tier → tier→role (seed/role-map). Build: (1) member-centric proposed-roster builder; (2) current-roster read (member's current purupuru:* roles, now possible via GuildMembers intent); (3) CV2 CM dashboard render — per-member before→after (current role(s) → proposed tier role + change indicator add/keep), counts, clear CM UI; SHADOW only (zero writes), voiceless, no persona imports. Testable for real: operator → purupuru:member. Apply (LIVE) is the follow-up (bd-glb live roster-identity + audit + Apply button).

title: Per-member tier→role assignment: close the LIVE identity-link adapter + go_live orchestration seam (bd-tfl part 2 follow-up)
description:
bd-tfl part 2 (per-member tier→role assign-batch) shipped the PURE join + batch assembly (apps/bot/src/shadow/score-tier-assignment.ts: buildTierAssignments + assembleAssignBatch, gate-validated E2E via goLive→applyBatch with the MOCK writer). TWO seams remain open (NOT faked — flagged per the dispatch contract):

SEAM 1 — LIVE wallet↔discord-SNOWFLAKE adapter. The builder takes an injectable WalletDiscordLink (wallet → discord snowflake | null). The gate's assignRole does guild.members.fetch(member_id), so member_id MUST be a Discord snowflake. The repo's WalletResolver port (ambient/ports/wallet-resolver.port.ts) surfaces discord_HANDLE (display string), NOT the snowflake — unusable for assignment. The freeside_auth MCP resolver (persona-engine/.../freeside_auth/server.ts) DOES carry ResolvedWallet.discord_id (the snowflake, from midi_profiles direct + additional_wallets jsonb), but no port exposes it to the shadow seam. ACTION: add a thin live WalletDiscordLink adapter reading discord_id (via freeside_auth MCP resolve_wallet OR identity-api /v1/resolve/account), batched/cached.

SEAM 2 — the go_live→build→applyBatch ORCHESTRATION entrypoint. assembleAssignBatch threads goLive's {capability, authzDecisionId, reportHash, transitionVersion} + a roster-freshness RosterVersion into a gate-valid WriteIntentBatch. But the bot entrypoint that (a) authorizes the admin, (b) calls goLive, (c) reads the live leaderboard + roster, (d) runs the create-pass (FR-4) for not-yet-created tier roles, then (e) this assign-builder + applyBatch — is not wired. assembleAssignBatch is ASSIGN-ONLY by design (per the brief); the create half is the substrate go_live/computeProposed flow.

SEAM 3 (substrate, freeside-worlds) — LatentQualified provenance. shadow-substrate effectful/loaders.ts (SHA 26d11b7) HARDCODES source:'MOCK' on every LatentQualified. Even the LIVE ScoreSource (part 1) surfaces as source:'MOCK' in the Discrepancy. Honest LIVE provenance requires a freeside-worlds substrate change to thread a LIVE flag through loadLatentCounts — file in freeside-worlds (SACRED here; do not edit the SHA-pinned package).

Ref: grimoires/loa/context/2026-06-03-scoresource-live-adapter-build-brief.md + bd-tfl.
notes: Built + hardened on cycle/scoresource-m2v → PR #165. Seams closed. Follow-ups: true-batch resolveWallets (here) + bd-glb (freeside-worlds: LatentQualified provenance + RosterSource identity-snapshot port + live RosterIdentityReader).
close_reason: done

Phantom @0xhoneyjar/inventory import at TWO sites — announce-mint.ts:348 (mint image+traits) AND orchestrator/inventory/resolve-nft-pfp.ts:36 (spotlight PFP). One repoint fixes BOTH surfaces. title: LIVE ScoreSource adapter — wire score-api community-scoped Purupuru tiers into shadow proposed-roster
description:
Closes the structural hole: composition-root wires makeRosterSourceLive/RoleWriterLive/AcvpEmitterLive/AdminAllowlistLive but NO makeScoreSourceLive, so the substrate's ScoreSource.latentQualified port is unimplemented and proposed-roster defaults to {} (mocked). 

CONTRACT (grounded 2026-06-03 against score-api origin/main, cycle-032 #229/#231/#232 MERGED): score-api now serves PER-COMMUNITY tiers. Endpoint: GET {SCORE_API_URL}/v1/leaderboard?community=purupuru (full roster) + GET /v1/wallets/:address?community=purupuru (single). Auth: x-api-key scoped via api_key_community_scope.allowedCommunities incl 'purupuru' (fail-closed: out-of-scope=403, never silent-Mibera). Response: CommunityLeaderboardEntry / CommunityWalletProfile (fields: wallet, rank, combined_score, tier, tier_class crowd|elite) — community has its OWN tier bands (community_tier_config), NOT Mibera's crowd/elite enum. Consume typed pkg @0xhoneyjar/score-api-types (communityLeaderboardResponseSchema, CommunityLeaderboardEntry). 

BUILD: (1) REST community score client (extend packages/persona-engine/src/score/, not the MCP client); (2) makeScoreSourceLive Layer implementing ScoreSource.latentQualified — join score-api wallet->tier with identity-api wallet<->discord (resolve/account) -> proposed roster keyed by member; (3) wire into composition-root goLive Layer behind a flag (SCORE_PURUPURU_API_KEY present => LIVE else MOCK, tag source MOCK|LIVE honestly); (4) tests. 

UPSTREAM DEPS (operator/zerker): Purupuru-scoped score-api API key; real Purupuru contract addresses (score-api has PLACEHOLDERS -> tiers currently seeded/synthetic). Adapter is buildable+shippable behind the flag without them (mock default). Ref: grimoires/loa/context/2026-06-03-scoresource-live-adapter-build-brief.md
notes: Absorbed into consolidated PR #165 (Part 1 + Part 2 + 13 BB hardening fixes). #164 closed superseded.
